positive: A stylized, highly contrasting deep jungle flora pattern featuring oversized bioluminescent lily pads, interlocking jungle vines, and geometric monstera leaves. The composition should be centrally focused and symmetrical, suitable for a seamless apparel print. Use a color palette dominated by emerald green, sapphire blue, and striking neon coral accents. Style: Neo-Art Deco meeting Tropical Minimalism. Lighting: Cinematic volumetric light filtering through dense canopy, creating strong, defined silhouettes. High detail, clean line work, vector illustration quality, high contrast.
negative: blur, artifact, watermark, logo, text, messy, gradient, low detail, ugly, deformed, bad anatomy, cropped, out of frame, noise
